content:
Hello! A Google Form was shared ~6 months ago on Reddit for volunteer translators to send their application. I completed and send mine Thursday last week because I would very much like to help translate the game in French (it's my native language). I know everyone is super busy working on the game, I'm not here to ask for an answer to my application, please take all the time you need. I just want to make sure that you *did* receive it, in case you changed the way you recruit volunteers since then <:Nautila_think:1459077762684948500> 

(I apologize if this isn't the right place to ask this, I don't use Discord much and I have to admit that I'm a little overwhelmed by all the channels <:flop1:1356083604236800030> Let me know if I need to move this message elsewhere!)
thread_title: Traduction en Français - Collecte de Traduction en Français - Collecte de Retour
